summary: Completed comprehensive testing of cake shop order management features including admin orders page with status updates, customer cart functionality, and order placement flow
passed_tests: Admin login and authentication
Admin orders page loads with status filter buttons (all/pending/confirmed/delivered/cancelled)
Admin can change order status via dropdown select
Admin order stats update correctly after status changes
Product detail page shows Add to Cart form with weight/flavor/date/message selectors
Product detail page price updates dynamically when weight is changed
Add to Cart functionality works - adds item to cart via API
Cart page loads and shows cart items with remove button functionality
Cart page shows order summary with total price calculation
Cart page checkout form has all delivery details fields
Place Order from cart works - creates order and redirects to My Orders
My Orders page loads and shows customer's orders with status badges
Navbar shows Cart and Orders links for logged-in users
No 404 errors on admin-orders.html, admin-users.html, cart.html, orders.html
Backend APIs for cart, orders, and admin functionality all working
Complete order flow from product selection to order placement
Admin order management with status updates (pending→confirmed→delivered→cancelled)
User authentication and session management
Dynamic price calculation based on weight selection
Order history display with proper formatting
